name: Fresh Tagiatelle with Garlic, Rucola and Sundried Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: 2 bunches rucola, stemmed, washed & spun dry, to yield 4 cups
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 12-inch sauté pan, heat olive oil over medium heat.
2. Add garlic and cook until light golden brown.
3. Add sundried tomato pieces and wine. Remove from heat.
4. Drop Tagliatelle into boiling water and cook until tender (about 1 minute).
5. Drain pasta in a colander.
6. Pour the drained pasta into the pan with sundried tomatoes.
7. Return to heat and toss in the rucola.
8. Stir gently for about 30 seconds until rucola is slightly wilted.
9. Serve immediately.
Yield: 4 servings
